creator: phk@phk.freebsd.dk
text:
In message <20061123070647.GA5370@admin.sibptus.tomsk.ru>, Victor Sudakov write
s:
>Poul-Henning Kamp wrote:
>> 
>> >>Description:
>> >Adding NO_TOOLCHAIN=true to /etc/make.conf breaks buildworld if
>> >/usr/src is mounted readonly.
>> 
>> NO_TOOLCHAIN can only be used during installworld.
>> 
>
>This should be mentioned in /usr/share/examples/etc/make.conf
>
>What other /etc/make.conf options cannot be used during buildworld?

Don't know.
